verse.verse_4: Qāla rabbi innī wahanal-‘aẓmu minnī wasyta‘alar-ra'su syaibaw wa lam akum bidu‘ā'ika rabbi syaqiyyā(n).
verse.verse_5: Wa innī khiftul-mawāliya miw warā'ī wa kānatimra'atī ‘āqiran fahab lī mil ladunka waliyyā(n).
verse.verse_6: Yariṡunī wa yariṡu min āli ya‘qūba waj‘alhu rabbi raḍiyyā(n).
verse.verse_7: Yā zakariyyā innā nubasysyiruka bigulāminismuhū yaḥyā, lam naj‘al lahū min qablu samiyyā(n).
verse.verse_8: Qāla rabbi annā yakūnu lī gulāmuw wa kānatimra'atī ‘āqiraw wa qad balagtu minal-kibari ‘itiyyā(n).
verse.verse_9: Qāla każālik(a), qāla rabbuka huwa ‘alayya hayyinuw wa qad khalaqtuka min qablu wa lam taku syai'ā(n).
verse.verse_10: Qāla rabbij‘al lī āyah(tan), qāla āyatuka allā tukalliman-nāsa  ṡalāṡa layālin sawiyyā(n).
verse.verse_11: Fa kharaja ‘alā qaumihī minal-miḥrābi fa auḥā ilaihim an sabbiḥū bukrataw wa ‘asyiyyā(n).
verse.verse_12: Yā yaḥyā khużil-kitāba biquwwah(tin), wa ātaināhul-ḥukma ṣabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_13: Wa ḥanānam mil ladunnā wa zakāh(tan), wa kāna taqiyyā(n).
verse.verse_14: Wa barram biwālidaihi wa lam yakun jabbāran ‘aṣiyyā(n).
verse.verse_15: Wa salāmun ‘alaihi yauma wulida wa yauma yamūtu wa yauma yub‘aṡu ḥayyā(n).
verse.verse_16: Ważkur fil-kitābi maryam(a), iżintabażat min ahlihā makānan syarqiyyā(n).
verse.verse_17: Fattakhażat min dūnihim ḥijābā(n), fa arsalnā ilaihā rūḥanā fa tamaṡṡala lahā basyaran sawiyyā(n).
verse.verse_18: Qālat innī a‘ūżu bir-raḥmāni minka in kunta taqiyyā(n).
verse.verse_19: Qāla innamā ana rasūlu rabbik(a), li'ahaba laki gulāman zakiyyā(n).
verse.verse_20: Qālat annā yakūnu lī gulāmuw wa lam yamsasnī basyaruw wa lam aku bagiyyā(n).
verse.verse_21: Qāla każālik(a), qāla rabbuka huwa ‘alayya hayyin(un), wa linaj‘alahū āyatal lin-nāsi wa raḥmatam minnā, wa kāna amram maqḍiyyā(n).
verse.verse_22: Fa ḥamalathu fantabażat bihī makānan qaṣiyyā(n).
verse.verse_23: Fa ajā'ahal-makhāḍu ilā jiz‘in nakhlah(ti), qālat yā laitanī mittu qabla hāżā wa kuntu nas-yam mansiyyā(n).
verse.verse_24: Fa nādāhā min taḥtihā allā taḥzanī qad ja‘ala rabbuki taḥtaki sariyyā(n).
verse.verse_25: Wa huzzī ilaiki bijiz‘in-nakhlati tusāqiṭ ‘alaiki ruṭaban janiyyā(n).
verse.verse_26: Fa kulī wasyrabī wa qarrī ‘ainā(n), fa immā tarayinna minal-basyari aḥadā(n), fa qūlī innī nażartu lir-raḥmāni ṣauman falan ukallimal-yauma insiyyā(n).
verse.verse_27: Fa atat bihī qaumahā taḥmiluh(ū), qālū yā maryamu laqad ji'ti syai'an fariyyā(n).
verse.verse_28: Yā ukhta hārūna kāna abūkimra'a sau'iw wa mā kānat ummuki bagiyyā(n).
verse.verse_29: Fa asyārat ilaīh(i), qālū kaifa nukallimu man kāna fil-mahdi ṣabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_30: Qāla innī ‘abdullāh(i), ātāniyal-kitāba wa ja‘alanī nabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_31: Wa ja‘alanī mubārakan aina mā kunt(u), wa auṣānī biṣ-ṣalāti waz-zakāti mā dumtu ḥayyā(n).
verse.verse_32: Wa barram biwālidatī wa lam yaj‘alnī jabbāran syaqiyyā(n).
verse.verse_33: Was-salāmu ‘alayya yauma wulittu wa yauma amūtu wa yauma ub‘aṡu ḥayyā(n).
verse.verse_35: Mā kāna lillāhi ay yattakhiża miw waladin subḥānah(ū), iżā qaḍā amran fa innamā yaqūlu lahū kun fa yakūn(u).
verse.verse_36: Wa innallāha rabbī wa rabbukum fa‘budūh(u), hāżā ṣirāṭum mustaqīm(un).
verse.verse_37: Fakhtalafal-aḥzābu mim bainihim, fa wailul lil-lażīna kafarū mim masyhadi yaumin ‘aẓīm(in).
verse.verse_38: Asmi‘ bihim wa abṣir, yauma ya'tūnanā lākiniẓ-ẓālimūnal-yauma fī ḍalālim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_39: Wa anżirhum yaumal-ḥasrati  iż quḍiyal-amr(u), wa hum fī gaflatiw wa hum lā yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_40: Innā naḥnu nariṡul-arḍa wa man ‘alaihā wa ilainā yurja‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_41: Ważkur fil-kitābi ibrāhīm(a), innahū kāna ṣiddīqan nabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_42: Iż qāla li'abīhi yā abati lima ta‘budu mā lā yasma‘u wa lā yubṣiru wa lā yugnī ‘anka syai'ā(n).
verse.verse_43: Yā abati innī qad jā'anī minal-‘ilmi mā lam ya'tika fattabi‘nī ahdika ṣirāṭan sawiyyā(n).
verse.verse_44: Yā abati lā ta‘budisy-syaiṭān(a), innasy-syaiṭāna kāna lir-raḥmāni ‘aṣiyyā(n).
verse.verse_45: Yā abati innī akhāfu ay yamassaka ‘ażābum minar-raḥmāni fa takūna lisy-syaiṭāni waliyyā(n).
verse.verse_46: Qāla arāgibun anta ‘an ālihatī yā ibrāhīm(u), la'illam tantahi la'arjumannaka wahjurnī maliyyā(n).
verse.verse_47: Qāla salāmun ‘alaik(a), sa'astagfiru laka rabbī, innahū kāna bī ḥafiyyā(n).
verse.verse_48: Wa a‘tazilukum wa mā tad‘ūna min dūnillāhi wa ad‘ū rabbī, ‘asā allā akūna bidu‘ā'i rabbī syaqiyyā(n).
verse.verse_49: Falamma‘tazalahum wa mā ya‘budūna min dūnillāh(i), wahabnā lahū isḥāqa wa ya‘qūb(a),  wa kullan ja‘alnā nabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_50: Wa wahabnā lahum mir raḥmatinā wa ja‘alnā lahum lisāna ṣidqin ‘aliyyā(n).
verse.verse_51: Ważkur  fil-kitābi mūsā, innahū kāna mukhlaṣaw wa kāna rasūlan nabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_52: Wa nādaināhu min jānibiṭ-ṭūril-aimani wa qarrabnāhu najiyyā(n).
verse.verse_53: Wa wahabnā lahū mir raḥmatinā akhāhu hārūna nabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_54: Ważkur  fil-kitābi ismā‘īl(a), innahū kāna ṣādiqal-wa‘di wa kāna rasūlan nabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_55: Wa kāna ya'muru ahlahū biṣ-ṣalāti waz-zakāh(ti), wa kāna ‘inda rabbihī marḍiyyā(n).
verse.verse_56: Ważkur  fil-kitābi idrīs(a), innahū kāna ṣādiqan nabiyyā(n).
verse.verse_58: Ulā'ikal-lażīna an‘amallāhu ‘alaihim minan-nabiyyīna min żurriyyati ādama wa mimman ḥamalnā ma‘a nūḥ(in), wa min żurriyyati ibrāhīma wa isrā'īl(a), wa mimman hadainā wajtabainā, iżā tutlā ‘alaihim āyātur-raḥmāni kharrū sujjadaw wa bukiyyā(n).
verse.verse_59: Fa khalafa mim ba‘dihim khalfun aḍā‘uṣ-ṣalāta wattaba‘usy-syahawāti fa saufa yalqauna gayyā(n).
verse.verse_60: Illā man tāba wa āmana wa ‘amila ṣāliḥan fa ulā'ika yadkhulūnal-jannata wa lā yuẓlamūna syai'ā(n).
verse.verse_61: Jannāti ‘adninil-latī wa‘adar-raḥmānu ‘ibādahū bil-gaib(i), innahū kāna wa‘duhū ma'tiyyā(n).
verse.verse_62: Lā yasma‘ūna fīhā lagwan illā salāmā(n), wa lahum rizquhum fīhā bukrataw wa ‘asyiyyā(n).
verse.verse_63: Tilkal-jannatul-latī nūriṡu min ‘ibādinā man kāna taqiyyā(n).
verse.verse_64: Wa mā natanazzalu illā bi'amri rabbik(a), lahū mā baina aidīnā wa mā khalfanā wa mā baina żālika wa mā kāna rabbuka nasiyyā(n).
verse.verse_65: Rabbus-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa mā bainahumā fa‘budhu waṣṭabir li‘ibādatih(ī), hal ta‘lamu lahū samiyyā(n).
verse.verse_66: Wa yaqūlul-insānu a'iżā mā mittu lasaufa ukhraju ḥayyā(n).
verse.verse_67: Awalā yażkurul-insānu annā khalaqnāhu min qablu wa lam yaku syai'ā(n).
verse.verse_68: Fa wa rabbika lanaḥsyurannahum wasy-syayāṭīna ṡumma lanuḥḍirannahum ḥaula jahannama jiṡiyyā(n).
verse.verse_69: Ṡumma lananzi‘anna min kulli syī‘atin ayyuhum asyaddu ‘alar-raḥmāni ‘itiyyā(n).
verse.verse_70: Ṡumma lanaḥnu a‘lamu bil-lażīna  hum aulā bihā ṣiliyyā(n).
verse.verse_71: Wa im minkum illā wāriduhā, kāna ‘alā rabbika ḥatmam maqḍiyyā(n).
verse.verse_72: Ṡumma nunajjil-lażīnattaqau wa nażaruẓ-ẓālimīna fīhā jiṡiyyā(n).
verse.verse_73: Wa iżā tutlā ‘alaihim āyātunā bayyinātin qālal-lażīna kafarū lil-lażīna āmanū, ayyul-farīqaini khairum maqāmaw wa aḥsanu nadiyyā(n).
verse.verse_74: Wa kam ahlaknā qablahum min qarnin hum aḥsanu aṡāṡaw wa ri'yā(n).
verse.verse_75: Qul man kāna fiḍ-ḍalālati falyamdud lahur-raḥmānu maddā(n), ḥattā iżā ra'au mā yū‘adūna immal-‘ażāba wa immas-sā‘ata fa saya‘lamūna man huwa syarrum makānaw wa aḍ‘afu jundā(n).
verse.verse_76: Wa yazīdullāhul-lażīnahtadau hudā(n), wal-bāqiyātuṣ-ṣāliḥātu khairun ‘inda rabbika ṡawābaw wa khairum maraddā(n).
verse.verse_77: Afa ra'aital-lażī kafara bi'āyātinā wa qāla la'ūtayanna mālaw wa waladā(n).
verse.verse_79: Kallā, sanaktubu mā yaqūlu wa namuddu lahū minal-‘ażābi maddā(n).
verse.verse_80: Wa nariṡuhū mā yaqūlu wa ya'tīnā fardā(n).
verse.verse_81: Wattakhażū min dūnillāhi ālihatal liyakūnū lahum ‘izzā(n).
verse.verse_82: Kallā, sayakfurūna bi‘ibādatihim wa yakūnūna ‘alaihim ḍiddā(n).
verse.verse_83: Alam tara annā arsalnasy-syayāṭīna ‘alal-kāfirīna ta'uzzuhum azzā(n).
verse.verse_90: Takādus-samāwātu yatafaṭṭarna  minhu wa tansyaqqul-arḍu wa takhirrul-jibālu haddā(n).
verse.verse_92: Wa mā yambagī lir-raḥmāni ay yattakhiża waladā(n).
verse.verse_93: In kullu man fis-samāwāti wal-arḍi illā ātir-raḥmāni ‘abdā(n).
verse.verse_96: Innal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti sayaj‘alu lahumur-raḥmānu wuddā(n).
verse.verse_97: Fa innamā yassarnāhu bilisānika litubasysyira bihil-muttaqīna wa tunżira bihī qaumal luddā(n).
verse.verse_98: Wa kam ahlaknā qablahum min qarn(in), hal tuḥissu minhum min aḥadin au tasma‘u lahum rikzā(n).
